d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003emodelOverrides\u003c/code\u003e setting to map model picker entries to custom provider model IDs (e.g. Bedrock inference profile ARNs)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded actionable guidance when OAuth login or connectivity checks fail due to SSL certificate errors (corporate proxies, \u003ccode\u003eNODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed freezes and 100% CPU loops triggered by permission prompts for complex bash commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a deadlock that could freeze Claude Code when many skill files changed at once (e.g. during \u003ccode\u003egit pull\u003c/code\u003e in a repo with a large \u003ccode\u003e.claude/skills/\u003c/code\u003e directory)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Bash tool output being lost when running multiple Claude Code sessions in the same project directory\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed subagents with \u003ccode\u003emodel: opus\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003esonnet\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003ehaiku\u003c/code\u003e being silently downgraded to older model versions on Bedrock, Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed background bash processes spawned by subagents not being cleaned up when the agent exits\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/resume\u003c/code\u003e showing the current session in the picker\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/ide\u003c/code\u003e crashing with \u003ccode\u003eonInstall is not defined\u003c/code\u003e when auto-installing the extension\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/loop\u003c/code\u003e not being available on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry and when telemetry was disabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed SessionStart hooks firing twice when resuming a session via \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--continue\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed JSON-output hooks injecting no-op system-reminder messages into the model's context on every turn\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed voice mode session corruption when a slow connection overlaps a new recording\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Linux sandbox failing to start with \"ripgrep (rg) not found\" on native builds\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Linux native modules not loading on Amazon Linux 2 and other glibc 2.26 systems\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \"media_type: Field required\" API error when receiving images via Remote Control\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/heapdump\u003c/code\u003e failing on Windows with \u003ccode\u003eEEXIST\u003c/code\u003e error when the Desktop folder already exists\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved Up arrow after interrupting Claude — now restores the interrupted prompt and rewinds the conversation in one step\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved IDE detection speed at startup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved clipboard image pasting performance on macOS\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/effort\u003c/code\u003e to work while Claude is responding, matching \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e behavior\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved voice mode to automatically retry transient connection failures during rapid push-to-talk re-press\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved the Remote Control spawn mode selection prompt with better context\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged default Opus model on Bedrock, Vertex, and Microsoft Foundry to Opus 4.6 (was Opus 4.1)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDeprecated \u003ccode\u003e/output-style\u003c/code\u003e command — use \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e instead. Output style is now fixed at session start for better prompt caching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed HTTP 400 errors for users behind proxies or on Bedrock/Vertex with Claude 4.5 models\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.72\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2172\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.72\" href=\"#2172\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed tool search to activate even with \u003ccode\u003eANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\u003c/code\u003e as long as \u003ccode\u003eENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH\u003c/code\u003e is set.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003ew\u003c/code\u003e key in \u003ccode\u003e/copy\u003c/code\u003e to write the focused selection directly to a file, bypassing the clipboard (useful over SSH)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded optional description argument to \u003ccode\u003e/plan\u003c/code\u003e (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e/plan fix the auth bug\u003c/code\u003e) that enters plan mode and immediately starts\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eExitWorktree\u003c/code\u003e tool to leave an \u003ccode\u003eEnterWorktree\u003c/code\u003e session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_CRON\u003c/code\u003e environment variable to immediately stop scheduled cron jobs mid-session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003elsof\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003epgrep\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etput\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ess\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003efd\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003efdfind\u003c/code\u003e to the bash auto-approval allowlist, reducing permission prompts for common read-only operations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRestored the \u003ccode\u003emodel\u003c/code\u003e parameter on the Agent tool for per-invocation model overrides\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSimplified effort levels to low/medium/high (removed max) with new symbols (○ ◐ ●) and a brief notification instead of a persistent icon. Use \u003ccode\u003e/effort auto\u003c/code\u003e to reset to default\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e — Escape now cancels changes, Enter saves and closes, Space toggles settings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved up-arrow history to show current session's messages first when running multiple concurrent sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved voice input transcription accuracy for repo names and common dev terms (regex, OAuth, JSON)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved bash command parsing by switching to a native module — faster initialization and no memory leak\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced bundle size by ~510 KB\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged CLAUDE.md HTML comments (\u003ccode\u003e\u0026lt;!-- ... --\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e) to be hidden from Claude when auto-injected. Comments remain visible when read with the Read tool\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slow exits when background tasks or hooks were slow to respond\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed agent task progress stuck on \"Initializing…\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skill hooks firing twice per event when a hooks-enabled skill is invoked by the model\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed several voice mode issues: occasional input lag, false \"No speech detected\" errors after releasing push-to-talk, and stale transcripts re-filling the prompt after submission\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--continue\u003c/code\u003e not resuming from the most recent point after \u003ccode\u003e--compact\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bash security parsing edge cases\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for marketplace git URLs without \u003ccode\u003e.git\u003c/code\u003e suffix (Azure DevOps, AWS CodeCommit)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved marketplace clone failure messages to show diagnostic info even when git produces no stderr\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed several plugin issues: installation failing on Windows with \u003ccode\u003eEEXIST\u003c/code\u003e error in OneDrive folders, marketplace blocking user-scope installs when a project-scope install exists, \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR\u003c/code\u003e creating literal \u003ccode\u003e~\u003c/code\u003e directories, and \u003ccode\u003eplugin.json\u003c/code\u003e with marketplace-only fields failing to load\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed feedback survey appearing too frequently in long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--effort\u003c/code\u003e CLI flag being reset by unrelated settings writes on startup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed backgrounded Ctrl+B queries losing their transcript or corrupting the new conversation after \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e killing background agent/bash tasks — only foreground tasks are now cleared\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed worktree isolation issues: Task tool resume not restoring cwd, and background task notifications missing \u003ccode\u003eworktreePath\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eworktreeBranch\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e not displaying results when run while Claude is working\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed digit keys selecting menu options instead of typing in plan mode permission prompt's text input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed sandbox permission issues: certain file write operations incorrectly allowed without prompting, and output redirections to allowlisted directories (like \u003ccode\u003e/tmp/claude/\u003c/code\u003e) prompting unnecessarily\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved CPU utilization in long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompt cache invalidation in SDK \u003ccode\u003equery()\u003c/code\u003e calls, reducing input token costs up to 12x\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Escape key becoming unresponsive after cancelling a query\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed double Ctrl+C not exiting when background agents or tasks are running\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed team agents to inherit the leader's model\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \"Always Allow\" saving permission rules that never match again\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed several hooks issues: \u003ccode\u003etranscript_path\u003c/code\u003e pointing to the wrong directory for resumed/forked sessions, agent \u003ccode\u003eprompt\u003c/code\u003e being silently deleted from settings.json on every settings write, PostToolUse block reason displaying twice, async hooks not receiving stdin with bash \u003ccode\u003eread -r\u003c/code\u003e, and validation error message showing an example that fails validation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session crashes in Desktop/SDK when Read returned files containing U+2028/U+2029 characters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed terminal title being cleared on exit even when \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE\u003c/code\u003e was set\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed several permission rule matching issues: wildcard rules not matching commands with heredocs, embedded newlines, or no arguments; \u003ccode\u003esandbox.excludedCommands\u003c/code\u003e failing with env var prefixes; \"always allow\" suggesting overly broad prefixes for nested CLI tools; and deny rules not applying to all command forms\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed oversized and truncated images from Bash data-URL output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash when resuming sessions that contained Bedrock API errors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed intermittent \"expected boolean, received string\" validation errors on Edit, Bash, and Grep tool inputs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed multi-line session titles when forking from a conversation whose first message contained newlines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed queued messages not showing attached images, and images being lost when pressing ↑ to edit a queued message\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed parallel tool calls where a failed Read/WebFetch/Glob would cancel its siblings — only Bash errors now cascade\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed scroll speed in integrated terminals not matching native terminals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed Shift+Enter submitting input instead of inserting a newline for users with older keybindings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added effort level indicator on the input border\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added \u003ccode\u003evscode://anthropic.claude-code/open\u003c/code\u003e URI handler to open a new Claude Code tab programmatically, with optional \u003ccode\u003eprompt\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003esession\u003c/code\u003e query parameters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.71\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2171\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.71\" href=\"#2171\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/loop\u003c/code\u003e command to run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. \u003ccode\u003e/loop 5m check the deploy\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded cron scheduling tools for recurring prompts within a session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003evoice:pushToTalk\u003c/code\u003e keybinding to make the voice activation key rebindable in \u003ccode\u003ekeybindings.json\u003c/code\u003e (default: space) — modifier+letter combos like \u003ccode\u003emeta+k\u003c/code\u003e have zero typing interference\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003efmt\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ecomm\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ecmp\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003enumfmt\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eexpr\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etest\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eprintf\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003egetconf\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eseq\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003etsort\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003epr\u003c/code\u003e to the bash auto-approval allowlist\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed stdin freeze in long-running sessions where keystrokes stop being processed but the process stays alive\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a 5–8 second startup freeze for users with voice mode enabled, caused by CoreAudio initialization blocking the main thread after system wake\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed startup UI freeze when many claude.ai proxy connectors refresh an expired OAuth token simultaneously\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed forked conversations (\u003ccode\u003e/fork\u003c/code\u003e) sharing the same plan file, which caused plan edits in one fork to overwrite the other\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the Read tool putting oversized images into context when image processing failed, breaking subsequent turns in long image-heavy sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed false-positive permission prompts for compound bash commands containing heredoc commit messages\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin installations being lost when running multiple Claude Code instances\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed claude.ai connectors failing to reconnect after OAuth token refresh\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed claude.ai MCP connector startup notifications appearing for every org-configured connector instead of only previously connected ones\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed background agent completion notifications missing the output file path, which made it difficult for parent agents to recover agent results after context compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed duplicate output in Bash tool error messages when commands exit with non-zero status\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Chrome extension auto-detection getting permanently stuck on \"not installed\" after running on a machine without local Chrome\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/plugin marketplace update\u003c/code\u003e failing with merge conflicts when the marketplace is pinned to a branch/tag ref\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/plugin marketplace add owner/repo@ref\u003c/code\u003e incorrectly parsing \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e — previously only \u003ccode\u003e#\u003c/code\u003e worked as a ref separator, causing undiagnosable errors with \u003ccode\u003estrictKnownMarketplaces\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed duplicate entries in \u003ccode\u003e/permissions\u003c/code\u003e Workspace tab when the same directory is added with and without a trailing slash\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--print\u003c/code\u003e hanging forever when team agents are configured — the exit loop no longer waits on long-lived \u003ccode\u003ein_process_teammate\u003c/code\u003e tasks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \"❯ Tool loaded.\" appearing in the REPL after every \u003ccode\u003eToolSearch\u003c/code\u003e call\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompting for \u003ccode\u003ecd \u0026lt;cwd\u0026gt; \u0026amp;\u0026amp; git ...\u003c/code\u003e on Windows when the model uses a mingw-style path\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup time by deferring native image processor loading to first use\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved bridge session reconnection to complete within seconds after laptop wake from sleep, instead of waiting up to 10 minutes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/plugin uninstall\u003c/code\u003e to disable project-scoped plugins in \u003ccode\u003e.claude/settings.local.json\u003c/code\u003e instead of modifying \u003ccode\u003e.claude/settings.json\u003c/code\u003e, so changes don't affect teammates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved plugin-provided MCP server deduplication — servers that duplicate a manually-configured server (same command/URL) are now skipped, preventing duplicate connections and tool sets. Suppressions are shown in the \u003ccode\u003e/plugin\u003c/code\u003e menu.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated \u003ccode\u003e/debug\u003c/code\u003e to toggle debug logging on mid-session, since debug logs are no longer written by default\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved startup notification noise for unauthenticated org-registered claude.ai connectors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.70\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2170\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.70\" href=\"#2170\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API 400 errors when using \u003ccode\u003eANTHROPIC_BASE_URL\u003c/code\u003e with a third-party gateway — tool search now correctly detects proxy endpoints and disables \u003ccode\u003etool_reference\u003c/code\u003e blocks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eAPI Error: 400 This model does not support the effort parameter\u003c/code\u003e when using custom Bedrock inference profiles or other model identifiers not matching standard Claude naming patterns\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed empty model responses immediately after \u003ccode\u003eToolSearch\u003c/code\u003e — the server renders tool schemas with system-prompt-style tags at the prompt tail, which could confuse models into stopping early\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompt-cache bust when an MCP server with \u003ccode\u003einstructions\u003c/code\u003e connects after the first turn\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Enter inserting a newline instead of submitting when typing over a slow SSH connection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed clipboard corrupting non-ASCII text (CJK, emoji) on Windows/WSL by using PowerShell \u003ccode\u003eSet-Clipboard\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed extra VS Code windows opening at startup on Windows when running from the VS Code integrated terminal\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed voice mode failing on Windows native binary with \"native audio module could not be loaded\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed push-to-talk not activating on session start when \u003ccode\u003evoiceEnabled: true\u003c/code\u003e was set in settings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed markdown links containing \u003ccode\u003e#NNN\u003c/code\u003e references incorrectly pointing to the current repository instead of the linked URL\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed repeated \"Model updated to Opus 4.6\" notification when a project's \u003ccode\u003e.claude/settings.json\u003c/code\u003e has a legacy Opus model string pinned\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugins showing as inaccurately installed in \u003ccode\u003e/plugin\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugins showing \"not found in marketplace\" errors on fresh startup by auto-refreshing after marketplace installation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/security-review\u003c/code\u003e command failing with \u003ccode\u003eunknown option merge-base\u003c/code\u003e on older git versions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/color\u003c/code\u003e command having no way to reset back to the default color — \u003ccode\u003e/color default\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/color gray\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/color reset\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003e/color none\u003c/code\u003e now restore the default\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a performance regression in the \u003ccode\u003eAskUserQuestion\u003c/code\u003e preview dialog that re-ran markdown rendering on every keystroke in the notes input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed feature flags read during early startup never refreshing their disk cache, causing stale values to persist across sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003epermissions.defaultMode\u003c/code\u003e settings values other than \u003ccode\u003eacceptEdits\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003eplan\u003c/code\u003e being applied in Claude Code Remote environments — they are now ignored\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skill listing being re-injected on every \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e (~600 tokens saved per resume)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed teleport marker not rendering in VS Code teleported sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved error message when microphone captures silence to distinguish from \"no speech detected\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved compaction to preserve images in the summarizer request, allowing prompt cache reuse for faster and cheaper compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/rename\u003c/code\u003e to work while Claude is processing, instead of being silently queued\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced prompt input re-renders during turns by ~74%\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced startup memory by ~426KB for users without custom CA certificates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced Remote Control \u003ccode\u003e/poll\u003c/code\u003e rate to once per 10 minutes while connected (was 1–2s), cutting server load ~300×. Reconnection is unaffected — transport loss immediately wakes fast polling.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added spark icon in VS Code activity bar that lists all Claude Code sessions, with sessions opening as full editors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added full markdown document view for plans in VS Code, with support for adding comments to provide feedback\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added native MCP server management dialog — use \u003ccode\u003e/mcp\u003c/code\u003e in the chat panel to enable/disable servers, reconnect, and manage OAuth authentication without switching to the terminal\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.69\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2169\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.69\" href=\"#2169\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded the \u003ccode\u003e/claude-api\u003c/code\u003e skill for building applications with the Claude API and Anthropic SDK\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Ctrl+U on an empty bash prompt (\u003ccode\u003e!\u003c/code\u003e) to exit bash mode, matching \u003ccode\u003eescape\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003ebackspace\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded numeric keypad support for selecting options in Claude's interview questions (previously only the number row above QWERTY worked)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded optional name argument to \u003ccode\u003e/remote-control\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eclaude remote-control\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003e/remote-control My Project\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--name \"My Project\"\u003c/code\u003e) to set a custom session title visible in claude.ai/code\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Voice STT support for 10 new languages (20 total) — Russian, Polish, Turkish, Dutch, Ukrainian, Greek, Czech, Danish, Swedish, Norwegian\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded effort level display (e.g., \"with low effort\") to the logo and spinner, making it easier to see which effort setting is active\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded agent name display in terminal title when using \u003ccode\u003eclaude --agent\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003esandbox.enableWeakerNetworkIsolation\u003c/code\u003e setting (macOS only) to allow Go programs like \u003ccode\u003egh\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003egcloud\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003eterraform\u003c/code\u003e to verify TLS certificates when using a custom MITM proxy with \u003ccode\u003ehttpProxyPort\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eincludeGitInstructions\u003c/code\u003e setting (and \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_GIT_INSTRUCTIONS\u003c/code\u003e env var) to remove built-in commit and PR workflow instructions from Claude's system prompt\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/reload-plugins\u003c/code\u003e command to activate pending plugin changes without restarting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded a one-time startup prompt suggesting Claude Code Desktop on macOS and Windows (max 3 showings, dismissible)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}\u003c/code\u003e variable for skills to reference their own directory in SKILL.md content\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eInstructionsLoaded\u003c/code\u003e hook event that fires when CLAUDE.md or \u003ccode\u003e.claude/rules/*.md\u003c/code\u003e files are loaded into context\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eagent_id\u003c/code\u003e (for subagents) and \u003ccode\u003eagent_type\u003c/code\u003e (for subagents and \u003ccode\u003e--agent\u003c/code\u003e) to hook events\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eworktree\u003c/code\u003e field to status line hook commands with name, path, branch, and original repo directory when running in a \u003ccode\u003e--worktree\u003c/code\u003e session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003epluginTrustMessage\u003c/code\u003e in managed settings to append organization-specific context to the plugin trust warning shown before installation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded policy limit fetching (e.g., remote control restrictions) for Team plan OAuth users, not just Enterprise\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003epathPattern\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003estrictKnownMarketplaces\u003c/code\u003e for regex-matching file/directory marketplace sources alongside \u003ccode\u003ehostPattern\u003c/code\u003e restrictions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded plugin source type \u003ccode\u003egit-subdir\u003c/code\u003e to point to a subdirectory within a git repo\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eoauth.authServerMetadataUrl\u003c/code\u003e config option for MCP servers to specify a custom OAuth metadata discovery URL when standard discovery fails\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a security issue where nested skill discovery could load skills from gitignored directories like \u003ccode\u003enode_modules\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed trust dialog silently enabling all \u003ccode\u003e.mcp.json\u003c/code\u003e servers on first run. You'll now see the per-server approval dialog as expected\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eclaude remote-control\u003c/code\u003e crashing immediately on npm installs with \"bad option: --sdk-url\" (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3986490065\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/28334\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/28334/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/28334\"\u003e#28334\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--model claude-opus-4-0\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e--model claude-opus-4-1\u003c/code\u003e resolving to deprecated Opus versions instead of current\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed macOS keychain corruption when using multiple OAuth MCP servers. Large OAuth metadata blobs could overflow the \u003ccode\u003esecurity -i\u003c/code\u003e stdin buffer, silently leaving stale credentials behind and causing repeated \u003ccode\u003e/login\u003c/code\u003e prompts.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e.credentials.json\u003c/code\u003e losing \u003ccode\u003esubscriptionType\u003c/code\u003e (showing \"Claude API\" instead of \"Claude Pro\"/\"Claude Max\") when the profile endpoint transiently fails during token refresh (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"4013279626\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/30185\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/30185/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/30185\"\u003e#30185\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed ghost dotfiles (\u003ccode\u003e.bashrc\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eHEAD\u003c/code\u003e, etc.) appearing as untracked files in the working directory after sandboxed Bash commands on Linux\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Shift+Enter printing \u003ccode\u003e[27;2;13~\u003c/code\u003e instead of inserting a newline in Ghostty over SSH\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed stash (Ctrl+S) being cleared when submitting a message while Claude is working\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed ctrl+o (transcript toggle) freezing for many seconds in long sessions with lots of file edits\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plan mode feedback input not supporting multi-line text entry (backslash+Enter and Shift+Enter now insert newlines)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed cursor not moving down into blank lines at the top of the input box\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/stats\u003c/code\u003e crash when transcript files contain entries with missing or malformed timestamps\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a brief hang after a streaming error on long sessions (the transcript was being fully rewritten to drop one line; it is now truncated in place)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--setting-sources user\u003c/code\u003e not blocking dynamically discovered project skills\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed duplicate CLAUDE.md, slash commands, agents, and rules when running from a worktree nested inside its main repo (e.g. \u003ccode\u003eclaude -w\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin Stop/SessionEnd/etc hooks not firing after any \u003ccode\u003e/plugin\u003c/code\u003e operation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin hooks being silently dropped when two plugins use the same \u003ccode\u003e${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/...\u003c/code\u003e command template\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in long-running SDK/CCR sessions where conversation messages were retained unnecessarily\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API 400 errors in forked agents (autocompact, summarization) when resuming sessions that were interrupted mid-tool-batch\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \"unexpected tool_use_id found in tool_result blocks\" error when resuming conversations that start with an orphaned tool result\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed teammates accidentally spawning nested teammates via the Agent tool's \u003ccode\u003ename\u003c/code\u003e parameter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS\u003c/code\u003e being ignored during conversation compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/compact\u003c/code\u003e summary rendering as a user bubble in SDK consumers (Claude Code Remote web UI, VSCode extension)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed voice space bar getting stuck after a failed voice activation (module loading race, cold GrowthBook)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed worktree file copy on Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed global \u003ccode\u003e.claude\u003c/code\u003e folder detection on Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed symlink bypass where writing new files through a symlinked parent directory could escape the working directory in \u003ccode\u003eacceptEdits\u003c/code\u003e mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed sandbox prompting users to approve non-allowed domains when \u003ccode\u003eallowManagedDomainsOnly\u003c/code\u003e is enabled in managed settings — non-allowed domains are now blocked automatically with no bypass\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed interactive tools (e.g., \u003ccode\u003eAskUserQuestion\u003c/code\u003e) being silently auto-allowed when listed in a skill's allowed-tools, bypassing the permission prompt and running with empty answers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed multi-GB memory spike when committing with large untracked binary files in the working tree\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Escape not interrupting a running turn when the input box has draft text. Use Up arrow to pull queued messages back for editing, or Ctrl+U to clear the input line.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Android app crash when running local slash commands (\u003ccode\u003e/voice\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/cost\u003c/code\u003e) in Remote Control sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where old message array versions accumulated in React Compiler \u003ccode\u003ememoCache\u003c/code\u003e over long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where REPL render scopes accumulated over long sessions (~35MB over 1000 turns)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory retention in in-process teammates where the parent's full conversation history was pinned for the teammate's lifetime, preventing GC after \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e or auto-compact\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak in interactive mode where hook events could accumulate unboundedly during long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed hang when \u003ccode\u003e--mcp-config\u003c/code\u003e points to a corrupted file\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slow startup when many skills/plugins are installed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003ecd \u0026lt;outside-dir\u0026gt; \u0026amp;\u0026amp; \u0026lt;cmd\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e permission prompt to surface the chained command instead of only showing \"Yes, allow reading from /\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed conditional \u003ccode\u003e.claude/rules/*.md\u003c/code\u003e files (with \u003ccode\u003epaths:\u003c/code\u003e frontmatter) and nested CLAUDE.md files not loading in print mode (\u003ccode\u003eclaude -p\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e not fully clearing all session caches, reducing memory retention in long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed terminal flicker caused by animated elements at the scrollback boundary\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed UI frame drops on macOS when using MCP servers with OAuth (regression from 2.1.x)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed occasional frame stalls during typing caused by synchronous debug log flushes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eTeammateIdle\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eTaskCompleted\u003c/code\u003e hooks to support \u003ccode\u003e{\"continue\": false, \"stopReason\": \"...\"}\u003c/code\u003e to stop the teammate, matching \u003ccode\u003eStop\u003c/code\u003e hook behavior\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eWorktreeCreate\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eWorktreeRemove\u003c/code\u003e plugin hooks being silently ignored\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skill descriptions with colons (e.g., \"Triggers include: X, Y, Z\") failing to load from SKILL.md frontmatter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed project skills without a \u003ccode\u003edescription:\u003c/code\u003e frontmatter field not appearing in Claude's available skills list\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e showing identical token counts for all MCP tools from a server\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed literal \u003ccode\u003enul\u003c/code\u003e file creation on Windows when the model uses CMD-style \u003ccode\u003e2\u0026gt;nul\u003c/code\u003e redirection in Git Bash\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed extra blank lines appearing below each tool call in the expanded subagent transcript view (Ctrl+O)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Tab/arrow keys not cycling Settings tabs when \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e search box is focused but empty\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed service key OAuth sessions (CCR containers) spamming \u003ccode\u003e[ERROR]\u003c/code\u003e logs with 403s from profile-scoped endpoints\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed inconsistent color for \"Remote Control active\" status indicator\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Voice waveform cursor covering the first suffix letter when dictating mid-input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Voice input showing all 5 spaces during warmup instead of capping at ~2 (aligning with the \"keep holding…\" hint)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved spinner performance by isolating the 50ms animation loop from the surrounding shell, reducing render and CPU overhead during turns\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved UI rendering performance in native binaries with React Compiler\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e--worktree\u003c/code\u003e startup by eliminating a git subprocess on the startup path\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved macOS startup by eliminating redundant settings-file reloads when managed settings resolve\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved macOS startup for Claude.ai enterprise/team users by skipping an unnecessary keychain lookup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved MCP \u003ccode\u003e-p\u003c/code\u003e startup by pipelining claude.ai config fetch with local connections and using a concurrency pool instead of sequential batching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved voice startup by removing imperceptible warmup pulse animations that were causing re-render stutter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved MCP binary content handling: tools returning PDFs, Office documents, or audio now save decoded bytes to disk with the correct file extension instead of dumping raw base64 into the conversation context. WebFetch also saves binary responses alongside its summary.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage in long sessions by stabilizing \u003ccode\u003eonSubmit\u003c/code\u003e across message updates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved LSP tool rendering and memory context building to no longer read entire files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved session upload and memory sync to avoid reading large files into memory before size/binary checks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved file operation performance by avoiding reading file contents for existence checks (6 sites)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved documentation to clarify that \u003ccode\u003e--append-system-prompt-file\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e--system-prompt-file\u003c/code\u003e work in interactive mode (the docs previously said print mode only)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced baseline memory by ~16MB by deferring Yoga WASM preloading\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced memory footprint for SDK and CCR sessions using stream-json output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced memory usage when resuming large sessions (including compacted history)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced token usage on multi-agent tasks with more concise subagent final reports\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged Sonnet 4.5 users on Pro/Max/Team Premium to be automatically migrated to Sonnet 4.6\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged the \u003ccode\u003e/resume\u003c/code\u003e picker to show your most recent prompt instead of the first one. This also resolves some titles appearing as \u003ccode\u003e(session)\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged claude.ai MCP connector failures to show a notification instead of silently disappearing from the tool list\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged example command suggestions to be generated deterministically instead of calling Haiku\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged resuming after compaction to no longer produce a preamble recap before continuing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[SDK] Changed task creation to no longer require the \u003ccode\u003eactiveForm\u003c/code\u003e field — the spinner falls back to the task subject\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added compaction display as a collapsible \"Compacted chat\" card with the summary inside\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] The permission mode picker now respects \u003ccode\u003epermissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode\u003c/code\u003e from your effective Claude Code settings (including managed/policy settings) — when set to \u003ccode\u003edisable\u003c/code\u003e, bypass permissions mode is hidden from the picker\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed RTL text (Arabic, Hebrew, Persian) rendering reversed in the chat panel (regression in v2.1.63)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.68\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2168\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.68\" href=\"#2168\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOpus 4.6 now defaults to medium effort for Max and Team subscribers. Medium effort works well for most tasks — it's the sweet spot between speed and thoroughness. You can change this anytime with \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRe-introduced the \"ultrathink\" keyword to enable high effort for the next turn\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved Opus 4 and 4.1 from Claude Code on the first-party API — users with these models pinned are automatically moved to Opus 4.6\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.66\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2166\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.66\" href=\"#2166\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced spurious error logging\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.63\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2163\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.63\" href=\"#2163\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/simplify\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e/batch\u003c/code\u003e bundled slash commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed local slash command output like /cost appearing as user-sent messages instead of system messages in the UI\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eProject configs \u0026amp; auto memory now shared across git worktrees of the same repository\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS=false\u003c/code\u003e env var to opt out from making claude.ai MCP servers available\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e command to show the currently active model in the slash command menu\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded HTTP hooks, which can POST JSON to a URL and receive JSON instead of running a shell command\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed listener leak in bridge polling loop\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed listener leak in MCP OAuth flow cleanup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded manual URL paste fallback during MCP OAuth authentication. If the automatic localhost redirect doesn't work, you can paste the callback URL to complete authentication.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak when navigating hooks configuration menu\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed listener leak in interactive permission handler during auto-approvals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed file count cache ignoring glob ignore patterns\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in bash command prefix cache\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP tool/resource cache leak on server reconnect\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed IDE host IP detection cache incorrectly sharing results across ports\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed WebSocket listener leak on transport reconnect\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in git root detection cache that could cause unbounded growth in long-running sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in JSON parsing cache that grew unbounded over long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed remote sessions not appearing in conversation history\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a race condition in the REPL bridge where new messages could arrive at the server interleaved with historical messages during the initial connection flush, causing message ordering issues.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak where long-running teammates retained all messages in AppState even after conversation compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where MCP server fetch caches were not cleared on disconnect, causing growing memory usage with servers that reconnect frequently\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage in long sessions with subagents by stripping heavy progress message payloads during context compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \"Always copy full response\" option to the \u003ccode\u003e/copy\u003c/code\u003e picker. When selected, future \u003ccode\u003e/copy\u003c/code\u003e commands will skip the code block picker and copy the full response directly.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added session rename and remove actions to the sessions list\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e not resetting cached skills, which could cause stale skill content to persist in the new conversation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.62\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2162\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.62\" href=\"#2162\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 rates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.61\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.59\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2159\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.59\" href=\"#2159\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClaude automatically saves useful context to auto-memory. Manage with /memory\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/copy\u003c/code\u003e command to show an interactive picker when code blocks are present, allowing selection of individual code blocks or the full response.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \"always allow\" prefix suggestions for compound bash commands (e.g. \u003ccode\u003ecd /tmp \u0026amp;\u0026amp; git fetch \u0026amp;\u0026amp; git push\u003c/code\u003e) to compute smarter per-subcommand prefixes instead of treating the whole command as one\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved ordering of short task lists\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage in multi-agent sessions by releasing completed subagent task state\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP OAuth token refresh race condition when running multiple Claude Code instances simultaneously\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed shell commands not showing a clear error message when the working directory has been deleted\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed config file corruption that could wipe authentication when multiple Claude Code instances ran simultaneously\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv error\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.53\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a UI flicker where user input would briefly disappear after submission before the message rendered\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bulk agent kill (ctrl+f) to send a single aggregate notification instead of one per agent, and to properly clear the command queue\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed graceful shutdown sometimes leaving stale sessions when using Remote Control by parallelizing teardown network calls\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--worktree\u003c/code\u003e sometimes being ignored on first launch\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a panic (\"switch on corrupted value\") on Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash that could occur when spawning many processes on Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash in the WebAssembly interpreter on Linux x64 \u0026amp; Windows x64\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash that sometimes occurred after 2 minutes on Windows ARM64\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.52\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2152\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.52\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVS Code: Fixed extension crash on Windows (\"command 'claude-vscode.editor.openLast' not found\")\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.51\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2151\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.51\" href=\"#2151\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eclaude remote-control\u003c/code\u003e subcommand for external builds, enabling local environment serving for all users.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated plugin marketplace default git timeout from 30s to 120s and added \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS\u003c/code\u003e to configure.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for custom npm registries and specific version pinning when installing plugins from npm sources\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBashTool now skips login shell (\u003ccode\u003e-l\u003c/code\u003e flag) by default when a shell snapshot is available, improving command execution performance. Previously this required setting \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_BASH_NO_LOGIN=true\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a security issue where \u003ccode\u003estatusLine\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003efileSuggestion\u003c/code\u003e hook commands could execute without workspace trust acceptance in interactive mode.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTool results larger than 50K characters are now persisted to disk (previously 100K). This reduces context window usage and improves conversation longevity.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a bug where duplicate \u003ccode\u003econtrol_response\u003c/code\u003e messages (e.g. from WebSocket reconnects) could cause API 400 errors by pushing duplicate assistant messages into the conversation.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_ACCOUNT_UUID\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_USER_EMAIL\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_ORGANIZATION_UUID\u003c/code\u003e environment variables for SDK callers to provide account info synchronously, eliminating a race condition where early telemetry events lacked account metadata.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slash command autocomplete crashing when a plugin's SKILL.md description is a YAML array or other non-string type\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eThe \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e picker now shows human-readable labels (e.g., \"Sonnet 4.5\") instead of raw model IDs for pinned model versions, with an upgrade hint when a newer version is available.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eManaged settings can now be set via macOS plist or Windows Registry. Learn more at \u003ca href=\"https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#settings-files\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ehttps://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#settings-files\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.50\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2150\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.50\" href=\"#2150\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for \u003ccode\u003estartupTimeout\u003c/code\u003e configuration for LSP servers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eWorktreeCreate\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eWorktreeRemove\u003c/code\u003e hook events, enabling custom VCS setup and teardown when agent worktree isolation creates or removes worktrees.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a bug where resumed sessions could be invisible when the working directory involved symlinks, because the session storage path was resolved at different times during startup. Also fixed session data loss on SSH disconnect by flushing session data before hooks and analytics in the graceful shutdown sequence.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eLinux: Fixed native modules not loading on systems with glibc older than 2.30 (e.g., RHEL 8)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in agent teams where completed teammate tasks were never garbage collected from session state\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE\u003c/code\u003e to fully strip down skills, session memory, custom agents, and CLAUDE.md token counting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/mcp reconnect\u003c/code\u003e freezing the CLI when given a server name that doesn't exist\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak where completed task state objects were never removed from AppState\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for \u003ccode\u003eisolation: worktree\u003c/code\u003e in agent definitions, allowing agents to declaratively run in isolated git worktrees.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE\u003c/code\u003e mode now also disables MCP tools, attachments, hooks, and CLAUDE.md file loading for a fully minimal experience.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bug where MCP tools were not discovered when tool search is enabled and a prompt is passed in as a launch argument\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage during long sessions by clearing internal caches after compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eclaude agents\u003c/code\u003e CLI command to list all configured agents\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage during long sessions by clearing large tool results after they have been processed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where LSP diagnostic data was never cleaned up after delivery, causing unbounded memory growth in long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where completed task output was not freed from memory, reducing memory usage in long sessions with many tasks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance for headless mode (\u003ccode\u003e-p\u003c/code\u003e flag) by deferring Yoga WASM and UI component imports\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompt suggestion cache regression that reduced cache hit rates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed unbounded memory growth in long sessions by capping file history snapshots\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT\u003c/code\u003e environment variable to disable 1M context window support\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOpus 4.6 (fast mode) now includes the full 1M context window\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added \u003ccode\u003e/extra-usage\u003c/code\u003e command support in VS Code sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak where TaskOutput retained recent lines after cleanup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in CircularBuffer where cleared items were retained in the backing array\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in shell command execution where ChildProcess and AbortController references were retained after cleanup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.49\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2149\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.49\" href=\"#2149\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved MCP OAuth authentication with step-up auth support and discovery caching, reducing redundant network requests during server connections\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e--worktree\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003e-w\u003c/code\u003e) flag to start Claude in an isolated git worktree\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSubagents support \u003ccode\u003eisolation: \"worktree\"\u003c/code\u003e for working in a temporary git worktree\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Ctrl+F keybinding to kill background agents (two-press confirmation)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAgent definitions support \u003ccode\u003ebackground: true\u003c/code\u003e to always run as a background task\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePlugins can ship \u003ccode\u003esettings.json\u003c/code\u003e for default configuration\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed file-not-found errors to suggest corrected paths when the model drops the repo folder\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Ctrl+C and ESC being silently ignored when background agents are running and the main thread is idle. Pressing twice within 3 seconds now kills all background agents.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompt suggestion cache regression that reduced cache hit rates.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003eplugin enable\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eplugin disable\u003c/code\u003e to auto-detect the correct scope when \u003ccode\u003e--scope\u003c/code\u003e is not specified, instead of always defaulting to user scope\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSimple mode (\u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE\u003c/code\u003e) now includes the file edit tool in addition to the Bash tool, allowing direct file editing in simple mode.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePermission suggestions are now populated when safety checks trigger an ask response, enabling SDK consumers to display permission options\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSonnet 4.5 with 1M context is being removed from the Max plan in favor of our frontier Sonnet 4.6 model, which now has 1M context. Please switch in /model.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed verbose mode not updating thinking block display when toggled via \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e — memo comparators now correctly detect verbose changes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed unbounded WASM memory growth during long sessions by periodically resetting the tree-sitter parser\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed potential rendering issues caused by stale yoga layout references\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved performance in non-interactive mode (\u003ccode\u003e-p\u003c/code\u003e) by skipping unnecessary API calls during startup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved performance by caching authentication failures for HTTP and SSE MCP servers, avoiding repeated connection attempts to servers requiring auth\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed unbounded memory growth during long-running sessions caused by Yoga WASM linear memory never shrinking\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSDK model info now includes \u003ccode\u003esupportsEffort\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003esupportedEffortLevels\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003esupportsAdaptiveThinking\u003c/code\u003e fields so consumers can discover model capabilities.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eConfigChange\u003c/code\u003e hook event that fires when configuration files change during a session, enabling enterprise security auditing and optional blocking of settings changes.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance by caching MCP auth failures to avoid redundant connection attempts\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance by reducing HTTP calls for analytics token counting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance by batching MCP tool token counting into a single API call\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003edisableAllHooks\u003c/code\u003e setting to respect managed settings hierarchy — non-managed settings can no longer disable managed hooks set by policy (#26637)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e session picker showing raw XML tags for sessions that start with commands like \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e. Now correctly falls through to the session ID fallback.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved permission prompts for path safety and working directory blocks to show the reason for the restriction instead of a bare prompt with no context\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.47\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2147\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.47\" href=\"#2147\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed FileWriteTool line counting to preserve intentional trailing blank lines instead of stripping them with \u003ccode\u003etrimEnd()\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Windows terminal rendering bugs caused by \u003ccode\u003eos.EOL\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003e\\r\\n\u003c/code\u003e) in display code — line counts now show correct values instead of always showing 1 on Windows.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved VS Code plan preview: auto-updates as Claude iterates, enables commenting only when the plan is ready for review, and keeps the preview open when rejecting so Claude can revise.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a bug where bold and colored text in markdown output could shift to the wrong characters on Windows due to \u003ccode\u003e\\r\\n\u003c/code\u003e line endings.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed compaction failing when conversation contains many PDF documents by stripping document blocks alongside images before sending to the compaction API (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3949845650\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26188\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26188/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26188\"\u003e#26188\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage in long-running sessions by releasing API stream buffers, agent context, and skill state after use\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance by deferring SessionStart hook execution, reducing time-to-interactive by ~500ms.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where bash tool output was silently discarded on Windows when using MSYS2 or Cygwin shells.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved performance of \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e file mentions - file suggestions now appear faster by pre-warming the index on startup and using session-based caching with background refresh.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage by trimming agent task message history after tasks complete\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage during long agent sessions by eliminating O(n²) message accumulation in progress updates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the bash permission classifier to validate that returned match descriptions correspond to actual input rules, preventing hallucinated descriptions from incorrectly granting permissions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed user-defined agents only loading one file on NFS/FUSE filesystems that report zero inodes (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3946238115\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26044\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26044/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26044\"\u003e#26044\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin agent skills silently failing to load when referenced by bare name instead of fully-qualified plugin name (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3942639845\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25834\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25834/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25834\"\u003e#25834\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSearch patterns in collapsed tool results are now displayed in quotes for clarity\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWindows: Fixed CWD tracking temp files never being cleaned up, causing them to accumulate indefinitely (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3802633008\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/17600\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/17600/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/17600\"\u003e#17600\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUse \u003ccode\u003ectrl+f\u003c/code\u003e to kill all background agents instead of double-pressing ESC. Background agents now continue running when you press ESC to cancel the main thread, giving you more control over agent lifecycle.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API 400 errors (\"thinking blocks cannot be modified\") that occurred in sessions with concurrent agents, caused by interleaved streaming content blocks preventing proper message merging.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSimplified teammate navigation to use only Shift+Down (with wrapping) instead of both Shift+Up and Shift+Down.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where a single file write/edit error would abort all other parallel file write/edit operations. Independent file mutations now complete even when a sibling fails.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003elast_assistant_message\u003c/code\u003e field to Stop and SubagentStop hook inputs, providing the final assistant response text so hooks can access it without parsing transcript files.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed custom session titles set via \u003ccode\u003e/rename\u003c/code\u003e being lost after resuming a conversation (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3905424850\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23610\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23610/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23610\"\u003e#23610\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed collapsed read/search hint text overflowing on narrow terminals by truncating from the start.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where bash commands with backslash-newline continuation lines (e.g., long commands split across multiple lines with \u003ccode\u003e\\\u003c/code\u003e) would produce spurious empty arguments, potentially breaking command execution.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed built-in slash commands (\u003ccode\u003e/help\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/compact\u003c/code\u003e, etc.) being hidden from the autocomplete dropdown when many user skills are installed (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3877071000\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22020\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22020/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22020\"\u003e#22020\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP servers not appearing in the MCP Management Dialog after deferred loading\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session name persisting in status bar after \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e command (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3947173603\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26082\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26082/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/26082\"\u003e#26082\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crash when a skill's \u003ccode\u003ename\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003edescription\u003c/code\u003e in SKILL.md frontmatter is a bare number (e.g., \u003ccode\u003ename: 3000\u003c/code\u003e) — the value is now properly coerced to a string (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3942684555\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25837\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25837/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25837\"\u003e#25837\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed /resume silently dropping sessions when the first message exceeds 16KB or uses array-format content (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3940900471\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25721\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/25721/hovercard\"
