for reading \u003ccode\u003eenabledPlugins\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eextraKnownMarketplaces\u003c/code\u003e from \u003ccode\u003e--add-dir\u003c/code\u003e directories\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003espinnerTipsOverride\u003c/code\u003e setting to customize spinner tips — configure \u003ccode\u003etips\u003c/code\u003e with an array of custom tip strings, and optionally set \u003ccode\u003eexcludeDefault: true\u003c/code\u003e to show only your custom tips instead of the built-in ones\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eSDKRateLimitInfo\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eSDKRateLimitEvent\u003c/code\u003e types to the SDK, enabling consumers to receive rate limit status updates including utilization, reset times, and overage information\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Agent Teams teammates failing on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry by propagating API provider environment variables to tmux-spawned processes (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3904606377\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23561\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23561/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/23561\"\u003e#23561\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed sandbox \"operation not permitted\" errors when writing temporary files on macOS by using the correct per-user temp directory (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3869718442\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/21654\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/21654/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/21654\"\u003e#21654\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Task tool (backgrounded agents) crashing with a \u003ccode\u003eReferenceError\u003c/code\u003e on completion (\u003ca class=\"issue-link js-issue-link\" data-error-text=\"Failed to load title\" data-id=\"3878220720\" data-permission-text=\"Title is private\" data-url=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22087\" data-hovercard-type=\"issue\" data-hovercard-url=\"/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22087/hovercard\" href=\"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/22087\"\u003e#22087\u003c/a\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed autocomplete suggestions not being accepted on Enter when images are pasted in the input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skills invoked by subagents incorrectly appearing in main session context after compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed excessive \u003ccode\u003e.claude.json.backup\u003c/code\u003e files accumulating on every startup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin-provided commands, agents, and hooks not being available immediately after installation without requiring a restart\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup performance by removing eager loading of session history for stats caching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage for shell commands that produce large output — RSS no longer grows unboundedly with command output size\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved collapsed read/search groups to show the current file or search pattern being processed beneath the summary line while active\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Improved permission destination choice (project/user/session) to persist across sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv Zod schema construction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved prompt cache hit rates by moving date out of system prompt\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded one-time Opus 4.6 effort callout for eligible users\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed /resume showing interrupt messages as session titles\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed image dimension limit errors to suggest /compact\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.41\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded guard against launching Claude Code inside another Claude Code session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Agent Teams using wrong model identifier for Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry customers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash when MCP tools return image content during streaming\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed /resume session previews showing raw XML tags instead of readable command names\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved model error messages for Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry users with fallback suggestions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin browse showing misleading \"Space to Toggle\" hint for already-installed plugins\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed hook blocking errors (exit code 2) not showing stderr to the user\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003espeed\u003c/code\u003e attribute to OTel events and trace spans for fast mode visibility\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eclaude auth login\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eclaude auth status\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003eclaude auth logout\u003c/code\u003e CLI subcommands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Windows ARM64 (win32-arm64) native binary support\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/rename\u003c/code\u003e to auto-generate session name from conversation context when called without arguments\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved narrow terminal layout for prompt footer\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed file resolution failing for @-mentions with anchor fragments (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e@README.md#installation\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed FileReadTool blocking the process on FIFOs, \u003ccode\u003e/dev/stdin\u003c/code\u003e, and large files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed background task notifications not being delivered in streaming Agent SDK mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed cursor jumping to end on each keystroke in classifier rule input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed markdown link display text being dropped for raw URL\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed auto-compact failure error notifications being shown to users\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed permission wait time being included in subagent elapsed time display\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed proactive ticks firing while in plan mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed clear stale permission rules when settings change on disk\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed hook blocking errors showing stderr content in UI\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.39\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca immediately available after enabling /extra-usage\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" Learn more at \u003ca href=\"https://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ehttps://code.claude.com/docs/en/fast-mode\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.34\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2134\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.34\" href=\"#2134\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash when agent teams setting changed between renders\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a bug where commands excluded from sandboxing (via \u003ccode\u003esandbox.excludedCommands\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003edangerouslyDisableSandbox\u003c/code\u003e) could bypass the Bash ask permission rule when \u003ccode\u003eautoAllowBashIfSandboxed\u003c/code\u003e was enabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.33\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2133\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.33\" href=\"#2133\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed agent teammate sessions in tmux to send and receive messages\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed warnings about agent teams not being available on your current plan\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eTeammateIdle\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003eTaskCompleted\u003c/code\u003e hook events for multi-agent workflows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for restricting which sub-agents can be spawned via \u003ccode\u003eTask(agent_type)\u003c/code\u003e syntax in agent \"tools\" frontmatter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003ememory\u003c/code\u003e frontmatter field support for agents, enabling persistent memory with \u003ccode\u003euser\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eproject\u003c/code\u003e, or \u003ccode\u003elocal\u003c/code\u003e scope\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded plugin name to skill descriptions and \u003ccode\u003e/skills\u003c/code\u003e menu for better discoverability\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where submitting a new message while the model was in extended thinking would interrupt the thinking phase\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an API error that could occur when aborting mid-stream, where whitespace text combined with a thinking block would bypass normalization and produce an invalid request\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API proxy compatibility issue where 404 errors on streaming endpoints no longer triggered non-streaming fallback\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where proxy settings configured via \u003ccode\u003esettings.json\u003c/code\u003e environment variables were not applied to WebFetch and other HTTP requests on the Node.js build\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/resume\u003c/code\u003e session picker showing raw XML markup instead of clean titles for sessions started with slash commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved error messages for API connection failures — now shows specific cause (e.g., ECONNREFUSED, SSL errors) instead of generic \"Connection error\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eErrors from invalid managed settings are now surfaced\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added support for remote sessions, allowing OAuth users to browse and resume sessions from claude.ai\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added git branch and message count to the session picker, with support for searching by branch name\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed scroll-to-bottom under-scrolling on initial session load and session switch\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.32\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2132\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.32\" href=\"#2132\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClaude Opus 4.6 is now available!\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded research preview agent teams feature for multi-agent collaboration (token-intensive feature, requires setting CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eClaude now automatically records and recalls memories as it works\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \"Summarize from here\" to the message selector, allowing partial conversation summarization.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSkills defined in \u003ccode\u003e.claude/skills/\u003c/code\u003e within additional directories (\u003ccode\u003e--add-dir\u003c/code\u003e) are now loaded automatically.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e file completion showing incorrect relative paths when running from a subdirectory\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated --resume to re-use --agent value specified in previous conversation by default.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed: Bash tool no longer throws \"Bad substitution\" errors when heredocs contain JavaScript template literals like \u003ccode\u003e${index + 1}\u003c/code\u003e, which previously interrupted tool execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSkill character budget now scales with context window (2% of context), so users with larger context windows can see more skill descriptions without truncation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Thai/Lao spacing vowels (สระ า, ำ) not rendering correctly in the input field\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed slash commands incorrectly being executed when pressing Enter with preceding text in the input field\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Added spinner when loading past conversations list\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.31\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2131\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.31\" href=\"#2131\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded session resume hint on exit, showing how to continue your conversation later\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for full-width (zenkaku) space input from Japanese IME in checkbox selection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed PDF too large errors permanently locking up sessions, requiring users to start a new conversation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bash commands incorrectly reporting failure with \"Read-only file system\" errors when sandbox mode was enabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash that made sessions unusable after entering plan mode when project config in \u003ccode\u003e~/.claude.json\u003c/code\u003e was missing default fields\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003etemperatureOverride\u003c/code\u003e being silently ignored in the streaming API path, causing all streaming requests to use the default temperature (1) regardless of the configured override\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed LSP shutdown/exit compatibility with strict language servers that reject null params\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved system prompts to more clearly guide the model toward using dedicated tools (Read, Edit, Glob, Grep) instead of bash equivalents (\u003ccode\u003ecat\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003esed\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003egrep\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003efind\u003c/code\u003e), reducing unnecessary bash command usage\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved PDF and request size error messages to show actual limits (100 pages, 20MB)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced layout jitter in the terminal when the spinner appears and disappears during streaming\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved misleading Anthropic API pricing from model selector for third-party provider (Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry) users\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.30\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2130\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.30\" href=\"#2130\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003epages\u003c/code\u003e parameter to the Read tool for PDFs, allowing specific page ranges to be read (e.g., \u003ccode\u003epages: \"1-5\"\u003c/code\u003e). Large PDFs (\u0026gt;10 pages) now return a lightweight reference when \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e mentioned instead of being inlined into context.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded pre-configured OAuth client credentials for MCP servers that don't support Dynamic Client Registration (e.g., Slack). Use \u003ccode\u003e--client-id\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e--client-secret\u003c/code\u003e with \u003ccode\u003eclaude mcp add\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/debug\u003c/code\u003e for Claude to help troubleshoot the current session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for additional \u003ccode\u003egit log\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003egit show\u003c/code\u003e flags in read-only mode (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e--topo-order\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e--cherry-pick\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e--format\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e--raw\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded token count, tool uses, and duration metrics to Task tool results\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded reduced motion mode to the config\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed phantom \"(no content)\" text blocks appearing in API conversation history, reducing token waste and potential model confusion\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed prompt cache not correctly invalidating when tool descriptions or input schemas changed, only when tool names changed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed 400 errors that could occur after running \u003ccode\u003e/login\u003c/code\u003e when the conversation contained thinking blocks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a hang when resuming sessions with corrupted transcript files containing \u003ccode\u003eparentUuid\u003c/code\u003e cycles\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed rate limit message showing incorrect \"/upgrade\" suggestion for Max 20x users when extra-usage is unavailable\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed permission dialogs stealing focus while actively typing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed subagents not being able to access SDK-provided MCP tools because they were not synced to the shared application state\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a regression where Windows users with a \u003ccode\u003e.bashrc\u003c/code\u003e file could not run bash commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved memory usage for \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e (68% reduction for users with many sessions) by replacing the session index with lightweight stat-based loading and progressive enrichment\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003eTaskStop\u003c/code\u003e tool to display the stopped command/task description in the result line instead of a generic \"Task stopped\" message\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e to execute immediately instead of being queued\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added multiline input support to the \"Other\" text input in question dialogs (use Shift+Enter for new lines)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed duplicate sessions appearing in the session list when starting a new conversation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.29\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2129\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.29\" href=\"#2129\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 \u003ccode\u003esaved_hook_context\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.27\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2127\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.27\" href=\"#2127\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded tool call failures and denials to debug logs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed context management validation error for gateway users, ensuring \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS=1\u003c/code\u003e avoids the error\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e--from-pr\u003c/code\u003e flag to resume sessions linked to a specific GitHub PR number or URL\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSessions are now automatically linked to PRs when created via \u003ccode\u003egh pr create\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed /context command not displaying colored output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed status bar duplicating background task indicator when PR status was shown\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWindows: Fixed bash command execution failing for users with \u003ccode\u003e.bashrc\u003c/code\u003e files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eWindows: Fixed console windows flashing when spawning child processes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eVSCode: Fixed OAuth token expiration causing 401 errors after extended sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" gateway users on Bedrock and Vertex, ensuring \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS=1\u003c/code\u003e avoids the error\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv (\u003ccode\u003espinnerVerbs\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed mTLS and proxy connectivity for users behind corporate proxies or using client certificates\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed per-user temp directory isolation to prevent permission conflicts on shared systems\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a race condition that could cause 400 errors when prompt caching scope was enabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed pending async hooks not being cancelled when headless streaming sessions ended\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed tab completion not updating the input field when accepting a suggestion\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed ripgrep search timeouts silently returning empty results instead of reporting errors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved terminal rendering performance with optimized screen data layout\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged Bash commands to show timeout duration alongside elapsed time\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged merged pull requests to show a purple status indicator in the prompt footer\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[IDE] Fixed model options displaying incorrect region strings for Bedrock users in headless mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" non-interactive (-p) mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for full-width (zenkaku) number input from Japanese IME in option selection prompts\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed shell completion cache files being truncated on exit\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API errors when resuming sessions that were interrupted during tool execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed auto-compact triggering too early on models with large output token limits\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed task IDs potentially being reused after deletion\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed file search not working in VS Code extension on Windows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved read/search progress indicators to show \"Reading…\" while in progress and \"Read\" when complete\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved Claude to prefer file operation tools (Read, Edit, Write) over bash equivalents (cat, sed, awk)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added automatic Python virtual environment activation, ensuring \u003ccode\u003epython\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003epip\u003c/code\u003e commands use the correct interpreter (configurable via \u003ccode\u003eclaudeCode.usePythonEnvironment\u003c/code\u003e setting)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed message action buttons having incorrect background colors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded arrow key history navigation in vim normal mode when cursor cannot move further\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded external editor shortcut (Ctrl+G) to the help menu for better discoverability\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded PR review status indicator to the prompt footer, showing the current branch's PR state (approved, changes requested, pending, or draft) as a colored dot with a clickable link\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for loading \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE.md\u003c/code\u003e files from additional directories specified via \u003ccode\u003e--add-dir\u003c/code\u003e flag (requires setting \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_ADDITIONAL_DIRECTORIES_CLAUDE_MD=1\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded ability to delete tasks via the \u003ccode\u003eTaskUpdate\u003c/code\u003e tool\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session compaction issues that could cause resume to load full history instead of the compact summary\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed agents sometimes ignoring user messages sent while actively working on a task\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed wide character (emoji, CJK) rendering artifacts where trailing columns were not cleared when replaced by narrower characters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed JSON parsing errors when MCP tool responses contain special Unicode characters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed up/down arrow keys in multi-line and wrapped text input to prioritize cursor movement over history navigation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed draft prompt being lost when pressing UP arrow to navigate command history\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed ghost text flickering when typing slash commands mid-input\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed marketplace source removal not properly deleting settings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed duplicate output in some commands like \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed task list sometimes showing outside the main conversation view\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed syntax highlighting for diffs occurring within multiline constructs like Python docstrings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crashes when cancelling tool use\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/sandbox\u003c/code\u003e command UI to show dependency status with installation instructions when dependencies are missing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved thinking status text with a subtle shimmer animation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved task list to dynamically adjust visible items based on terminal height\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved fork conversation hint to show how to resume the original session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged collapsed read/search groups to show present tense (\"Reading\", \"Searching for\") while in progress, and past tense (\"Read\", \"Searched for\") when complete\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \u003ccode\u003eToolSearch\u003c/code\u003e results to appear as a brief notification instead of inline in the conversation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged the \u003ccode\u003e/commit-push-pr\u003c/code\u003e skill to automatically post PR URLs to Slack channels when configured via MCP tools\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged the \u003ccode\u003e/copy\u003c/code\u003e command to be available to all users\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged background agents to prompt for tool permissions before launching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged permission rules like \u003ccode\u003eBash(*)\u003c/code\u003e to be accepted and treated as equivalent to \u003ccode\u003eBash\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged config backups to be timestamped and rotated (keeping 5 most recent) to prevent data loss\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.19\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded env var \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS\u003c/code\u003e, set to \u003ccode\u003efalse\u003c/code\u003e to keep the old system temporarily\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded shorthand \u003ccode\u003e$0\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e$1\u003c/code\u003e, etc. for accessing individual arguments in custom commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crashes on processors without AVX instruction support\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed dangling Claude Code processes when terminal is closed by catching EIO errors from \u003ccode\u003eprocess.exit()\u003c/code\u003e and using SIGKILL as fallback\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/rename\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e/tag\u003c/code\u003e not updating the correct session when resuming from a different directory (e.g., git worktrees)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed resuming sessions by custom title not working when run from a different directory\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed pasted text content being lost when using prompt stash (Ctrl+S) and restore\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed agent list displaying \"Sonnet (default)\" instead of \"Inherit (default)\" for agents without an explicit model setting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed backgrounded hook commands not returning early, potentially causing the session to wait on a process that was intentionally backgrounded\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed file write preview omitting empty lines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged skills without additional permissions or hooks to be allowed without requiring approval\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged indexed argument syntax from \u003ccode\u003e$ARGUMENTS.0\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003e$ARGUMENTS[0]\u003c/code\u003e (bracket syntax)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[SDK] Added replay of \u003ccode\u003equeued_command\u003c/code\u003e attachment messages as \u003ccode\u003eSDKUserMessageReplay\u003c/code\u003e events when \u003ccode\u003ereplayUserMessages\u003c/code\u003e is enabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Enabled session forking and rewind functionality for all users\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.18\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca tracking\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added native plugin management support\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added ability for OAuth users to browse and resume remote Claude sessions from the Sessions dialog\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed out-of-memory crashes when resuming sessions with heavy subagent usage\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where the \"context remaining\" warning was not hidden after running \u003ccode\u003e/compact\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session titles on the resume screen not respecting the user's language setting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[IDE] Fixed a race condition on Windows where the Claude Code sidebar view container would not appear on start\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.15\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2115\" class=\"anchor\" \u003ccode\u003eclaude install\u003c/code\u003e or see \u003ca href=\"https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/getting-started\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ehttps://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/getting-started\u003c/a\u003e for more options\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved UI rendering performance with React Compiler\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the \"Context left until auto-compact\" warning not disappearing after running \u003ccode\u003e/compact\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP stdio server timeout not killing child process, which could cause UI freezes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.14\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded history-based autocomplete in bash mode (\u003ccode\u003e!\u003c/code\u003e) - type a partial command and press Tab to complete from your bash command history\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded search to installed plugins list - type to filter by name or description\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for pinning plugins to specific git commit SHAs, allowing marketplace entries to install exact versions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a regression where the context window blocking limit was calculated too aggressively, blocking users at ~65% context usage instead of the intended ~98%\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory issues that could cause crashes when running parallel subagents\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in long-running sessions where stream resources were not cleaned up after shell commands completed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e symbol incorrectly triggering file autocomplete suggestions in bash mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e@\u003c/code\u003e-mention menu folder click behavior to navigate into directories instead of selecting them\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/feedback\u003c/code\u003e command generating invalid GitHub issue URLs when description is very long\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e command to show the same token count and percentage as the status line in verbose mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed an issue where \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e, and \u003ccode\u003e/todos\u003c/code\u003e command overlays could close unexpectedly\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slash command autocomplete selecting wrong command when typing similar commands (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e vs \u003ccode\u003e/compact\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed inconsistent back navigation in plugin marketplace when only one marketplace is configured\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed iTerm2 progress bar not clearing properly on exit, preventing lingering indicators and bell sounds\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved backspace to delete pasted text as a single token instead of one character at a time\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added \u003ccode\u003e/usage\u003c/code\u003e command to display current plan usage\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.12\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca transports\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.10\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded new \u003ccode\u003eSetup\u003c/code\u003e hook event that can be triggered via \u003ccode\u003e--init\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e--init-only\u003c/code\u003e, or \u003ccode\u003e--maintenance\u003c/code\u003e CLI flags for repository setup and maintenance operations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded keyboard shortcut 'c' to copy OAuth URL when browser doesn't open automatically during login\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a crash when running bash commands containing heredocs with JavaScript template literals like \u003ccode\u003e${index + 1}\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved startup to capture keystrokes typed before the REPL is fully ready\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved file suggestions to show as removable attachments instead of inserting text when accepted\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added install count display to plugin listings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added trust warning when installing plugins\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.9\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-219\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.9\" href=\"#219\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eauto:N\u003c/code\u003e syntax for configuring the MCP tool search auto-enable threshold, where N is the context window percentage (0-100)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eplansDirectory\u003c/code\u003e setting to customize where plan files are stored\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded external editor support (Ctrl+G) in AskUserQuestion \"Other\" input field\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded session URL attribution to commits and PRs created from web sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for \u003ccode\u003ePreToolUse\u003c/code\u003e hooks to return \u003ccode\u003eadditionalContext\u003c/code\u003e to the model\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}\u003c/code\u003e string substitution for skills to access the current session ID\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed long sessions with parallel tool calls failing with an API error about orphan tool_result blocks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP server reconnection hanging when cached connection promise never resolves\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Ctrl+Z suspend not working in terminals using Kitty keyboard protocol (Ghostty, iTerm2, kitty, WezTerm)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.7\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-217\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.7\" href=\"#217\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eshowTurnDuration\u003c/code\u003e setting to hide turn duration messages (e.g., \"Cooked for 1m 6s\")\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded ability to provide feedback when accepting permission prompts\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded inline display of agent's final response in task notifications, making it easier to see results without reading the full transcript file\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed security vulnerability where wildcard permission rules could match compound commands containing shell operators\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed false \"file modified\" errors on Windows when cloud sync tools, antivirus scanners, or Git touch file timestamps without changing content\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed orphaned tool_result errors when sibling tools fail during streaming execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed context window blocking limit being calculated using the full context window instead of the effective context window (which reserves space for max output tokens)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed spinner briefly flashing when running local slash commands like \u003ccode\u003e/model\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e/theme\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed terminal title animation jitter by using fixed-width braille characters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugins with git submodules not being fully initialized when installed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bash commands failing on Windows when temp directory paths contained characters like \u003ccode\u003et\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003en\u003c/code\u003e that were misinterpreted as escape sequences\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved typing responsiveness by reducing memory allocation overhead in terminal rendering\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eEnabled MCP tool search auto mode by default for all users. When MCP tool descriptions exceed 10% of the context window, they are automatically deferred and discovered via the MCPSearch tool instead of being loaded upfront. This reduces context usage for users with many MCP tools configured. Users can disable this by adding \u003ccode\u003eMCPSearch\u003c/code\u003e to \u003ccode\u003edisallowedTools\u003c/code\u003e in their settings.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged OAuth and API Console URLs from console.anthropic.com to platform.claude.com\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed \u003ccode\u003eclaudeProcessWrapper\u003c/code\u003e setting passing the wrapper path instead of the Claude binary path\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.6\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-216\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.6\" href=\"#216\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 command for quickly filtering settings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Updates section to \u003ccode\u003e/doctor\u003c/code\u003e showing auto-update channel and available npm versions (stable/latest)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded date range filtering to \u003ccode\u003e/stats\u003c/code\u003e command - press \u003ccode\u003er\u003c/code\u003e to cycle between Last 7 days, Last 30 days, and All time\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded automatic discovery of skills from nested \u003ccode\u003e.claude/skills\u003c/code\u003e directories when working with files in subdirectories\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003econtext_window.used_percentage\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003econtext_window.remaining_percentage\u003c/code\u003e fields to status line input for easier context window display\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded an error display when the editor fails during Ctrl+G\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed permission bypass via shell line continuation that could allow blocked commands to execute\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed false \"File has been unexpectedly modified\" errors when file watchers touch files without changing content\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed text styling (bold, colors) getting progressively misaligned in multi-line responses\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed the feedback panel closing unexpectedly when typing 'n' in the description field\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed rate limit warning appearing at low usage after weekly reset (now requires 70% usage)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed rate limit options menu incorrectly auto-opening when resuming a previous session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed numpad keys outputting escape sequences instead of characters in Kitty keyboard protocol terminals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Option+Return not inserting newlines in Kitty keyboard protocol terminals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed corrupted config backup files accumulating in the home directory (now only one backup is created per config file)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003emcp list\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003emcp get\u003c/code\u003e commands leaving orphaned MCP server processes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed visual artifacts in ink2 mode when nodes become hidden via \u003ccode\u003edisplay:none\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved the external CLAUDE.md imports approval dialog to show which files are being imported and from where\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved the \u003ccode\u003e/tasks\u003c/code\u003e dialog to go directly to task details when there's only one background task running\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved @ autocomplete with icons for different suggestion types and single-line formatting\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated \"Help improve Claude\" setting fetch to refresh OAuth and retry when it fails due to a stale OAuth token\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged task notification display to cap at 3 lines with overflow summary when multiple background tasks complete simultaneously\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged terminal title to \"Claude Code\" on startup for better window identification\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved ability to @-mention MCP servers to enable/disable - use \u003ccode\u003e/mcp enable \u0026lt;name\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e instead\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed usage indicator not updating after manual compact\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" variable to override the temp directory used for internal temp files, useful for environments with custom temp directory requirements\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv environment variable to disable all background task functionality including auto-backgrounding and the Ctrl+B shortcut\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \"Help improve Claude\" setting fetch to refresh OAuth and retry when it fails due to a stale OAuth token\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.3\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-213\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.3\" href=\"#213\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMerged slash commands and skills, simplifying the mental model with no change in behavior\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded release channel (\u003ccode\u003estable\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003elatest\u003c/code\u003e) toggle to \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded detection and warnings for unreachable permission rules, with warnings in \u003ccode\u003e/doctor\u003c/code\u003e and after saving rules that include the source of each rule and actionable fix guidance\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plan files persisting across \u003ccode\u003e/clear\u003c/code\u003e commands, now ensuring a fresh plan file is used after clearing a conversation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed false skill duplicate detection on filesystems with large inodes (e.g., ExFAT) by using 64-bit precision for inode values\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed mismatch between background task count in status bar and items shown in tasks dialog\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed sub-agents using the wrong model during conversation compaction\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed web search in sub-agents using incorrect model\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed trust dialog acceptance when running from the home directory not enabling trust-requiring features like hooks during the session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved terminal rendering stability by preventing uncontrolled writes from corrupting cursor state\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved slash command suggestion readability by truncating long descriptions to 2 lines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged tool hook execution timeout from 60 seconds to 10 minutes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added clickable destination selector for permission requests, allowing you to choose where settings are saved (this project, all projects, shared with team, or session only)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.2\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-212\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.2\" href=\"#212\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded source path metadata to images dragged onto the terminal, helping Claude understand where images originated\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded clickable hyperlinks for file paths in tool output in terminals that support OSC 8 (like iTerm)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for Windows Package Manager (winget) installations with automatic detection and update instructions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Shift+Tab keyboard shortcut in plan mode to quickly select \"auto-accept edits\" option\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eFORCE_AUTOUPDATE_PLUGINS\u003c/code\u003e environment variable to allow plugin autoupdate even when the main auto-updater is disabled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eagent_type\u003c/code\u003e to SessionStart hook input, populated if \u003ccode\u003e--agent\u003c/code\u003e is specified\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a command injection vulnerability in bash command processing where malformed input could execute arbitrary commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a memory leak where tree-sitter parse trees were not being freed, causing WASM memory to grow unbounded over long sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed binary files (images, PDFs, etc.) being accidentally included in memory when using \u003ccode\u003e@include\u003c/code\u003e directives in CLAUDE.md files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed updates incorrectly claiming another installation is in progress\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed crash when socket files exist in watched directories (defense-in-depth for EOPNOTSUPP errors)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed remote session URL and teleport being broken when using \u003ccode\u003e/tasks\u003c/code\u003e command\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP tool names being exposed in analytics events by sanitizing user-specific server configurations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved Option-as-Meta hint on macOS to show terminal-specific instructions for native CSIu terminals like iTerm2, Kitty, and WezTerm\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved error message when pasting images over SSH to suggest using \u003ccode\u003escp\u003c/code\u003e instead of the unhelpful clipboard shortcut hint\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved permission explainer to not flag routine dev workflows (git fetch/rebase, npm install, tests, PRs) as medium risk\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged large bash command outputs to be saved to disk instead of truncated, allowing Claude to read the full content\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged large tool outputs to be persisted to disk instead of truncated, providing full output access via file references\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \u003ccode\u003e/plugins\u003c/code\u003e installed tab to unify plugins and MCPs with scope-based grouping\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDeprecated Windows managed settings path \u003ccode\u003eC:\\ProgramData\\ClaudeCode\\managed-settings.json\u003c/code\u003e - administrators should migrate to \u003ccode\u003eC:\\Program Files\\ClaudeCode\\managed-settings.json\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[SDK] Changed minimum zod peer dependency to ^4.0.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed usage display not updating after manual compact\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.1.0\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-210\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.1.0\" href=\"#210\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded automatic skill hot-reload - skills created or modified in \u003ccode\u003e~/.claude/skills\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e.claude/skills\u003c/code\u003e are now immediately available without restarting the session\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for running skills and slash commands in a forked sub-agent context using \u003ccode\u003econtext: fork\u003c/code\u003e in skill frontmatter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for \u003ccode\u003eagent\u003c/code\u003e field in skills to specify agent type for execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003elanguage\u003c/code\u003e setting to configure Claude's response language (e.g., language: \"japanese\")\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged Shift+Enter to work out of the box in iTerm2, WezTerm, Ghostty, and Kitty without modifying terminal configs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003erespectGitignore\u003c/code\u003e support in \u003ccode\u003esettings.json\u003c/code\u003e for per-project control over @-mention file picker behavior\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eIS_DEMO\u003c/code\u003e environment variable to hide email and organization from the UI, useful for streaming or recording sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed security issue where sensitive data (OAuth tokens, API keys, passwords) could be exposed in debug logs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed files and skills not being properly discovered when resuming sessions with \u003ccode\u003e-c\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed pasted content being lost when replaying prompts from history using up arrow or Ctrl+R search\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Esc key with queued prompts to only move them to input without canceling the running task\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced permission prompts for complex bash commands\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed command search to prioritize exact and prefix matches on command names over fuzzy matches in descriptions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed PreToolUse hooks to allow \u003ccode\u003eupdatedInput\u003c/code\u003e when returning \u003ccode\u003eask\u003c/code\u003e permission decision, enabling hooks to act as middleware while still requesting user consent\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed plugin path resolution for file-based marketplace sources\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed LSP tool being incorrectly enabled when no LSP servers were configured\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed background tasks failing with \"git repository not found\" error for repositories with dots in their names\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Claude in Chrome support for WSL environments\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Windows native installer silently failing when executable creation fails\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved CLI help output to display options and subcommands in alphabetical order for easier navigation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded wildcard pattern matching for Bash tool permissions using \u003ccode\u003e*\u003c/code\u003e at any position in rules (e.g., \u003ccode\u003eBash(npm *)\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eBash(* install)\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eBash(git * main)\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded unified Ctrl+B backgrounding for both bash commands and agents - pressing Ctrl+B now backgrounds all running foreground tasks simultaneously\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for MCP \u003ccode\u003elist_changed\u003c/code\u003e notifications, allowing MCP servers to dynamically update their available tools, prompts, and resources without requiring reconnection\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/teleport\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e/remote-env\u003c/code\u003e slash commands for claude.ai subscribers, allowing them to resume and configure remote sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for disabling specific agents using \u003ccode\u003eTask(AgentName)\u003c/code\u003e syntax in settings.json permissions or the \u003ccode\u003e--disallowedTools\u003c/code\u003e CLI flag\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded hooks support to agent frontmatter, allowing agents to define PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop hooks scoped to the agent's lifecycle\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded hooks support for skill and slash command frontmatter\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded new Vim motions: \u003ccode\u003e;\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e,\u003c/code\u003e to repeat f/F/t/T motions, \u003ccode\u003ey\u003c/code\u003e operator for yank with \u003ccode\u003eyy\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003eY\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ep\u003c/code\u003e/\u003ccode\u003eP\u003c/code\u003e for paste, text objects (\u003ccode\u003eiw\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eaw\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eiW\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eaW\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ei\"\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ea\"\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ei'\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ea'\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ei(\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ea(\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ei[\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ea[\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ei{\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ea{\u003c/code\u003e), \u003ccode\u003e\u0026gt;\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e\u0026lt;\u0026lt;\u003c/code\u003e for indent/dedent, and \u003ccode\u003eJ\u003c/code\u003e to join lines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/plan\u003c/code\u003e command shortcut to enable plan mode directly from the prompt\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded slash command autocomplete support when \u003ccode\u003e/\u003c/code\u003e appears anywhere in input, not just at the beginning\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e--tools\u003c/code\u003e flag support in interactive mode to restrict which built-in tools Claude can use during interactive sessions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003eCLAUDE_CODE_FILE_READ_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS\u003c/code\u003e environment variable to override the default file read token limit\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for \u003ccode\u003eonce: true\u003c/code\u003e config for hooks\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for YAML-style lists in frontmatter \u003ccode\u003eallowed-tools\u003c/code\u003e field for cleaner skill declarations\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for prompt and agent hook types from plugins (previously only command hooks were supported)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Cmd+V support for image paste in iTerm2 (maps to Ctrl+V)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded left/right arrow key navigation for cycling through tabs in dialogs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded real-time thinking block display in Ctrl+O transcript mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded filepath to full output in background bash task details dialog\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded Skills as a separate category in the context visualization\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed OAuth token refresh not triggering when server reports token expired but local expiration check disagrees\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session persistence getting stuck after transient server errors by recovering from 409 conflicts when the entry was actually stored\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed session resume failures caused by orphaned tool results during concurrent tool execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a race condition where stale OAuth tokens could be read from the keychain cache during concurrent token refresh attempts\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed AWS Bedrock subagents not inheriting EU/APAC cross-region inference model configuration, causing 403 errors when IAM permissions are scoped to specific regions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed API context overflow when background tasks produce large output by truncating to 30K chars with file path reference\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a hang when reading FIFO files by skipping symlink resolution for special file types\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed terminal keyboard mode not being reset on exit in Ghostty, iTerm2, Kitty, and WezTerm\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Alt+B and Alt+F (word navigation) not working in iTerm2, Ghostty, Kitty, and WezTerm\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\u003c/code\u003e not being substituted in plugin \u003ccode\u003eallowed-tools\u003c/code\u003e frontmatter, which caused tools to incorrectly require approval\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed files created by the Write tool using hardcoded 0o600 permissions instead of respecting the system umask\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed commands with \u003ccode\u003e$()\u003c/code\u003e command substitution failing with parse errors\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed multi-line bash commands with backslash continuations being incorrectly split and flagged for permissions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed bash command prefix extraction to correctly identify subcommands after global options (e.g., \u003ccode\u003egit -C /path log\u003c/code\u003e now correctly matches \u003ccode\u003eBash(git log:*)\u003c/code\u003e rules)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slash commands passed as CLI arguments (e.g., \u003ccode\u003eclaude /context\u003c/code\u003e) not being executed properly\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed pressing Enter after Tab-completing a slash command selecting a different command instead of submitting the completed one\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slash command argument hint flickering and inconsistent display when typing commands with arguments\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Claude sometimes redundantly invoking the Skill tool when running slash commands directly\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skill token estimates in \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e to accurately reflect frontmatter-only loading\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed subagents sometimes not inheriting the parent's model by default\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed model picker showing incorrect selection for Bedrock/Vertex users using \u003ccode\u003e--model haiku\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed duplicate Bash commands appearing in permission request option labels\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed noisy output when background tasks complete - now shows clean completion message instead of raw output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed background task completion notifications to appear proactively with bullet point\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed forked slash commands showing \"AbortError\" instead of \"Interrupted\" message when cancelled\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed cursor disappearing after dismissing permission dialogs\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/hooks\u003c/code\u003e menu selecting wrong hook type when scrolling to a different option\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed images in queued prompts showing as \"[object Object]\" when pressing Esc to cancel\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed images being silently dropped when queueing messages while backgrounding a task\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed large pasted images failing with \"Image was too large\" error\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed extra blank lines in multiline prompts containing CJK characters (Japanese, Chinese, Korean)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed ultrathink keyword highlighting being applied to wrong characters when user prompt text wraps to multiple lines\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed collapsed \"Reading X files…\" indicator incorrectly switching to past tense when thinking blocks appear mid-stream\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Bash read commands (like \u003ccode\u003els\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003ecat\u003c/code\u003e) not being counted in collapsed read/search groups, causing groups to incorrectly show \"Read 0 files\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed spinner token counter to properly accumulate tokens from subagents during execution\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed memory leak in git diff parsing where sliced strings retained large parent strings\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed race condition where LSP tool could return \"no server available\" during startup\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed feedback submission hanging indefinitely when network requests timeout\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed search mode in plugin discovery and log selector views exiting when pressing up arrow\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed hook success message showing trailing colon when hook has no output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMultiple optimizations to improve startup performance\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved terminal rendering performance when using native installer or Bun, especially for text with emoji, ANSI codes, and Unicode characters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved performance when reading Jupyter notebooks with many cells\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved reliability for piped input like \u003ccode\u003ecat refactor.md | claude\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved reliability for AskQuestion tool\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved sed in-place edit commands to render as file edits with diff preview\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved Claude to automatically continue when response is cut off due to output token limit, instead of showing an error message\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved compaction reliability\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved subagents (Task tool) to continue working after permission denial, allowing them to try alternative approaches\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved skills to show progress while executing, displaying tool uses as they happen\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved skills from \u003ccode\u003e/skills/\u003c/code\u003e directories to be visible in the slash command menu by default (opt-out with \u003ccode\u003euser-invocable: false\u003c/code\u003e in frontmatter)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved skill suggestions to prioritize recently and frequently used skills\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved spinner feedback when waiting for the first response token\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved token count display in spinner to include tokens from background agents\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved incremental output for async agents to give the main thread more control and visibility\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved permission prompt UX with Tab hint moved to footer, cleaner Yes/No input labels with contextual placeholders\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved the Claude in Chrome notification with shortened help text and persistent display until dismissed\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved macOS screenshot paste reliability with TIFF format support\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/stats\u003c/code\u003e output\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eUpdated Atlassian MCP integration to use a more reliable default configuration (streamable HTTP)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged \"Interrupted\" message color from red to grey for a less alarming appearance\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved permission prompt when entering plan mode - users can now enter plan mode without approval\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRemoved underline styling from image reference links\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[SDK] Changed minimum zod peer dependency to ^4.0.0\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added currently selected model name to the context menu\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added descriptive labels on auto-accept permission button (e.g., \"Yes, allow npm for this project\" instead of \"Yes, and don't ask again\")\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed paragraph breaks not rendering in markdown content\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Fixed scrolling in the extension inadvertently scrolling the parent iframe\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[Windows] Fixed issue with improper rendering\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 bugfixes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.0.74\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded LSP (Language Server Protocol) tool for code intelligence features like go-to-definition, find references, and hover documentation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/terminal-setup\u003c/code\u003e support for Kitty, Alacritty, Zed, and Warp terminals\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded ctrl+t shortcut in \u003ccode\u003e/theme\u003c/code\u003e to toggle syntax highlighting on/off\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded syntax highlighting info to theme picker\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded guidance for macOS users when Alt shortcuts fail due to terminal configuration\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed skill \u003ccode\u003eallowed-tools\u003c/code\u003e not being applied to tools invoked by the skill\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed Opus 4.5 tip incorrectly showing when user was already using Opus\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed a potential crash when syntax highlighting isn't initialized correctly\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed visual bug in \u003ccode\u003e/plugins discover\u003c/code\u003e where list selection indicator showed while search box was focused\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed macOS keyboard shortcuts to display 'opt' instead of 'alt'\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e command visualization with grouped skills and agents by source, slash commands, and sorted token count\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[Windows] Fixed issue with improper rendering\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added gift tag pictogram for year-end promotion message\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.0.73\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded clickable \u003ccode\u003e[Image #N]\u003c/code\u003e links that open attached images in the default viewer\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded alt-y yank-pop to cycle through kill ring history after ctrl-y yank\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded search filtering to the plugin discover screen (type to filter by name, description, or marketplace)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded support for custom session IDs when forking sessions with \u003ccode\u003e--session-id\u003c/code\u003e combined with \u003ccode\u003e--resume\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e--continue\u003c/code\u003e and \u003ccode\u003e--fork-session\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed slow input history cycling and race condition that could overwrite text after message submission\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved \u003ccode\u003e/theme\u003c/code\u003e command to open theme picker directly\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved theme picker UI\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved search UX across resume session, permissions, and plugins screens with a unified SearchBox component\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e[VSCode] Added tab icon badges showing pending permissions (blue) and unread completions (orange)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.0.72\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2072\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2.0.72\" href=\"#2072\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon that works with the Chrome extension (\u003ca href=\"https://claude.ai/chrome\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003ehttps://claude.ai/chrome\u003c/a\u003e) to let you control your browser directly from Claude Code\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReduced terminal flickering\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded scannable QR code to mobile app tip for quick app downloads\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded loading indicator when resuming conversations for better feedback\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed \u003ccode\u003e/context\u003c/code\u003e command not respecting custom system prompts in non-interactive mode\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed order of consecutive Ctrl+K lines when pasting with Ctrl+Y\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved @ mention file suggestion speed (~3× faster in git repositories)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved file suggestion performance in repos with \u003ccode\u003e.ignore\u003c/code\u003e or \u003ccode\u003e.rgignore\u003c/code\u003e files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eImproved settings validation errors to be more prominent\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eChanged thinking toggle from Tab to Alt+T to avoid accidental triggers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.0.71\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca suggestions\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eAdded \u003ccode\u003e/settings\u003c/code\u003e as an alias for the \u003ccode\u003e/config\u003c/code\u003e command\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed @ file reference suggestions incorrectly triggering when cursor is in the middle of a path\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed MCP servers from \u003ccode\u003e.mcp.json\u003c/code\u003e not loading when using \u003ccode\u003e--dangerously-skip-permissions\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eFixed permission rules incorrectly rejecting valid bash commands containing shell glob patterns (e.g., \u003ccode\u003els *.txt\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003efor f in *.png\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBedrock: Environment variable \u003ccode\u003eANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_BASE_URL\u003c/code\u003e is now respected for token counting and inference profile listing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNew syntax highlighting engine for native build\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2.0.70\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca
